name: Amphis
description: Fashioned with Grineer materials and balanced for marine infantry use, the Amphis is a traditional staff weapon that has received a monstrous makeover that enables shock damage on jump attacks. Connects with multiple enemies with each strike.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Fashioned with Grineer materials and balanced for marine infantry use, the Amphis is a traditional staff weapon that has received a monstrous makeover that enables shock damage on jump attacks. Connects with multiple enemies with each strike.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed visual FX on the Amphis that shone too brightly.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.5
patchlogs.changes: The Amphis and Tipedo are now available for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Amphis not using energy colour.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Amphis now deals Electricity damage on Ground Slams
